assumptions: The declared intragroup dividend has created a recognised monetary receivable/payable denominated in a currency that creates foreign exchange exposure between group entities with different functional currencies.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge of the intragroup monetary receivable
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 permits a fair value hedge of a recognised asset or liability, and its intragroup monetary-item exception makes that hedge route available in consolidation for foreign currency risk.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge of the intragroup monetary receivable
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 also permits a cash flow hedge of variability in cash flows associated with a recognised asset or liability, so it is a separate hedge accounting route to assess for the foreign currency exposure.
